description: A sticky plant secretion that can harden into a solid material is 'runae', together with the substance collected or processed from it. 'phunelo' (sap) moves through vascular tissue and is not another name for resin. Synthetic resins can use the same broad noun when their material class is what matters.
articulatory_notes: A tap or brief trill carries the voice into high-back rounded 'u'. Dental nasal 'n' opens onto stressed 'a', followed by a clean hiatus into final front 'e'.
usage_notes: A plant or preparation can identify the kind of 'runae' in use. Amber is fossilised resin with its own source identity.

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Collected resin can seal a vessel, join a handle, or scent a room when heated. Species, season, and preparation decide what it will do.

semantic_domains.creation: a plant-derived or synthetic material used in coatings, adhesives, and formed objects
semantic_domains.nature: a secretion produced by particular plants
semantic_domains.physical: a sticky material that may harden into a solid
